ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Current ranking of the player */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Total votes received for ranking */,
  "trophies" INTEGER /* Total trophies won by the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field (FW, MF, DF) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left or right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with these stats */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "sh_per_90" REAL /* Shots per 90 minutes */,
  "g_per_sh" REAL /* Goals per shot ratio */,
  "pass_completion" REAL /* Pass completion percentage */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Shots on target */,
  "dribbles_completed" INTEGER /* Dribbles completed */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Tackles won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "defensive_stats" (
  "def_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each defensive stat entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with these stats */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Total tackles made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total interceptions made by the player */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Total clearances made by the player */,
  "headed_clearances" INTEGER /* Number of headed clearances */,
  "successful_pressure" INTEGER /* Number of successful pressures */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("def_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_defensive_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "touch_distribution" (
  "touch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each touch distribution entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with these stats */,
  "touches" INTEGER /* Total touches made by the player */,
  "defensive_third" INTEGER /* Touches in the defensive third of the field */,
  "midfield_third" INTEGER /* Touches in the midfield third of the field */,
  "attacking_third" INTEGER /* Touches in the attacking third of the field */,
  "left_wing" INTEGER /* Touches on the left wing */,
  "right_wing" INTEGER /* Touches on the right wing */,
  "central_area" INTEGER /* Touches in the central area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("touch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_touch_distribution_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League in which the team competes */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is located */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_teams" (
  "player_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-team association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the player is associated with the team */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee paid for the player */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the player's contract in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player being voted for */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter (can be an analyst or fan) */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "vote_value" INTEGER /* Value of the vote or rank assigned */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment provided by the voter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, fan) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the user is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game association */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, broken bone) */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date the player will return to play */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
